legal.label: // legal
legal.title: Legal notices & Terms
legal.s1p1: from0tohero.dev is a personal project published by Diakité Mamadou Youssouf, Data Expert & Architect, based in Abidjan, Côte d'Ivoire.
legal.s2p1: from0tohero.dev is a free community platform that lists tech practitioners (Data, DevOps, Cloud, AI, Cybersecurity, Dev) along with their projects, articles, and events.
legal.s2p2: The platform is not a recruitment service, an agency, or a social network. Its sole purpose is to give visibility to practitioners who build concrete things in Africa and the diaspora.
legal.s3intro: By submitting a profile, article, or project, you agree to the following conditions:
legal.s3li1: The information submitted is accurate and belongs to you.
legal.s3li2: You hold the necessary rights to the submitted content.
legal.s3li3: The content does not contain hateful, discriminatory, or illegal material.
legal.s3li4: The platform reserves the right to refuse any content that does not match its editorial guidelines.
legal.s3li5: Any published content deemed non-compliant with these terms may be removed at any time, without notice or justification, at the sole discretion of the publisher.
legal.s3p2: Accepted submissions may be published, typographically corrected, or removed at any time by the publisher without notice.
legal.s4p1: All submitted content (texts, descriptions, links) remains the exclusive property of its author. The platform claims no ownership over submitted content.
legal.s4p2: By submitting content, you grant from0tohero.dev a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to display it on the platform.
legal.s4p3pre: The site's source code is open source and available on
legal.s4p3post: The visual identity, name, and logo of from0tohero.dev are the property of Diakité Mamadou Youssouf.
legal.s5p1: Data collected via forms (name, LinkedIn URL, country, bio, etc.) is used solely for publishing profiles on the platform. It is never sold or shared with third parties.
legal.s5li1: Practitioner profiles: name, role, country, bio, public links (LinkedIn, GitHub…)
legal.s5li2: Projects & articles: title, description, external links
legal.s5li3: Submissions: raw form data, retained for the duration of moderation
legal.s5p2pre: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, and delete your data. To exercise these rights, contact us via
legal.s6p1: from0tohero.dev uses no tracking cookies or third-party analytics tools. No browsing data is collected for advertising purposes.
legal.s6p2: Only technical cookies (necessary for the site to function) may be placed by hosting services (Vercel, Supabase). These cookies are not under the platform's direct control.
legal.s7p1: The platform strives to maintain accurate and up-to-date information, but does not guarantee the completeness or accuracy of content published by users.
legal.s7p2: External links (LinkedIn, GitHub, Medium, etc.) redirect to third-party sites whose content from0tohero.dev cannot control. We disclaim all responsibility for the content of those sites.
legal.s8intro: For any question regarding legal notices, your personal data, or content published on the platform:
